lessons_applied: History shows defensives (XLP/WMT/GLD/SLV) deliver +0.5-0.8% session PnL in risk-off chop vs tech/SaaS drags; trust brackets (no premature closes on -0.1-0.5% noise); deploy idle slots decisively after 19 cycles to capture alpha as cash yields 0%.
market_assessment: Neutral/choppy regime persists with SPY +0.15% amid tariff uncertainty, deepening tech valuation pressure from IGV/Palantir rout and Anthropic AI spending shift hitting ADBE/CRM/NOW, reinforcing risk-off rotation into defensives/safe-havens like SLV (+2.5 score leader +0.94%), GLD/XLP/WMT/GILD (+1.5 resilient greens). Insurance/financial PT lowers (TWFG/RYAN/MRSH/GSHD) add sector caution without broad defensive invalidation; portfolio +0.76% PnL confirms edge intact but 1 slot idle after 19 cycles.
